Quality Engineering Blog

Notes from the front lines of automation and release confidence.

Practical write-ups on Playwright, Node.js tooling, API validation, and the small workflow decisions that help teams ship with more confidence.

Playwright April 2, 2026

Building a Playwright setup that stays readable as tests scale

A walkthrough of the project structure, fixtures, and baseline conventions that make Playwright suites easier to maintain when a team moves from a handful of tests to a real regression layer.

NodeJS March 18, 2026

API testing with Jest and Node.js without the brittle setup

A simple pattern for validating response contracts, organizing fixtures, and keeping your API test layer fast enough to run constantly during feature work.

API Design February 9, 2026

Using mock servers to unblock UI and API work in parallel

How mock services help teams validate edge cases earlier, reduce waiting on dependencies, and build more predictable test data for frontend and backend collaboration.
